HP105,60069,000207,00094,000308,900128,0004011,100171,000★14,800250,000★ ★18,500340,000★ ★ ★22,200441,000★ ★ ★ ★33,400712,000Mythic44,500949,000Exclusive GearExclusive Gear Upgrade CostLevelShard CostCumulative Shard Cost1552101531530420505257563010573514084018094522510502751155330126039013654551470525158060516906951710079518110905191201,035201501,185NotesEnhancement Master BonusThe prerequisite for getting the Enhancement Master bonus is having a full set of equipment at the same level or higher, and of the same rarity or higher. For example, if all your gear (sword, helm, armor, and boots) are Epic at level 10, but your weapon is at Legendary level 10, you would qualify for the Epic Enhancement Master bonus for level 10.
